'''鈭歱-r-g-th''' ('''kapargethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:joint|joint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joint|joint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-r-g-th
|-
! Lemma
| kapargethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipargethoko|thipargethoko]] || [[word:jipargethoko|jipargethoko]] || [[word:shipargethoko|shipargethoko]] || [[word:kipargethoko|kipargethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupargethoko|thuthupargethoko]] || [[word:jujupargethoko|jujupargethoko]] || [[word:shushupargethoko|shushupargethoko]] || [[word:kukupargethoko|kukupargethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupargethoko|thupargethoko]] || [[word:jupargethoko|jupargethoko]] || [[word:shupargethoko|shupargethoko]] || [[word:kupargethoko|kupargethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopargethoko|thopargethoko]] || [[word:jopargethoko|jopargethoko]] || [[word:shopargethoko|shopargethoko]] || [[word:kopargethoko|kopargethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pargethoko|th忙pargethoko]] || [[word:j忙pargethoko|j忙pargethoko]] || [[word:sh忙pargethoko|sh忙pargethoko]] || [[word:k忙pargethoko|k忙pargethoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
